error: Gmail MCP integration unavailable — the Google Workspace connector was upgraded server-side and tool definitions are stale. The scheduled task could not authenticate/call Gmail. To fix: open Cowork, reload the session (or start a new one), and re-run the digest. Previous day's data is preserved below for reference.
summary: ⚠️ Today's digest could not be fetched — the Gmail connector needs to be reloaded (same issue as yesterday). Open Cowork and start a fresh session to refresh the integration, then trigger the digest again.
